scripts.hf:preview: npm run build:video && node scripts/run-hyperframes.mjs preview
scripts.hf:lint: npm run build:video && node scripts/run-hyperframes.mjs lint
scripts.hf:validate: npm run build:video && node scripts/run-hyperframes.mjs validate
scripts.hf:inspect: npm run build:video && node scripts/run-hyperframes.mjs inspect
scripts.hf:render: npm run build:video && node scripts/run-hyperframes.mjs render --output renders/radar-panel.mp4
